context:
Package: flextable v0.9.12.004
Description: Functions for Tabular Reporting
Function: as_qmd
Parameters: x, display
Test patterns used: test_that
Expectations used: expect_equal, expect_true

Function Code:
```r
as_qmd <- function(x, display = x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  display <- as.character(display)
  if (length(display) != length(x)) {
    stop(
      sprintf("`display` must be the same length as `x`: %.0f.", length(x)),
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }
  chunk_dataframe(
    txt = display,
    qmd_data = x
  )
}
```
